findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find eval and exec calls
 * @description Finds all calls to eval() and exec() functions
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/find-eval-exec
 * @tags security
 *       injection
 *       code-execution
 *       external/cwe/cwe-094
 *       external/cwe/cwe-095
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  call = API::builtin("eval").getACall() or
  call = API::builtin("exec").getACall()
select call, "Call to eval() or exec() found"
findings.hypothesis: Usage of eval() or exec() can lead to arbitrary code execution if inputs are not properly sanitized.

message.text: Call to eval() or exec() found
Call to eval() or exec() found

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name ImageMath.eval vulnerability
 * @description Detects if user input reaches the eval() call in ImageMath.py
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/imagemath-eval
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-095
 */

import python
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.DataFlow
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.TaintTracking
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.RemoteFlowSources
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

module ImageMathEvalConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource or
    source instanceof DataFlow::ParameterNode
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    exists(DataFlow::CallCfgNode call |
      call = API::builtin("eval").getACall() and
      sink = call.getArg(0) and
      call.getLocation().getFile().getShortName() = "ImageMath.py"
    )
  }
}

module ImageMathEvalFlow = TaintTracking::Global<ImageMathEvalConfig>;
import ImageMathEvalFlow::PathGraph

from ImageMathEvalFlow::PathNode source, ImageMathEvalFlow::PathNode sink
where ImageMathEvalFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential code injection in ImageMath.eval from $@", source.getNode(), "source"
findings.hypothesis: ImageMath.eval uses eval() which can lead to code execution if user input reaches it.

message.text:
Potential code injection in ImageMath.eval from [source](1)
Potential code injection in ImageMath.eval from [source](2)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Command Injection
 * @description Detects command injection vulnerabilities where user input flows to command execution APIs.
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/command-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */

import python
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.DataFlow
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.TaintTracking
import semmle.python.dataflow.new.RemoteFlowSources
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs
import semmle.python.Concepts

module CommandInjectionConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    source instanceof RemoteFlowSource or
    source instanceof DataFlow::ParameterNode
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    sink instanceof SystemCommandExecution
  }
}

module CommandInjectionFlow = TaintTracking::Global<CommandInjectionConfig>;
import CommandInjectionFlow::PathGraph

from CommandInjectionFlow::PathNode source, CommandInjectionFlow::PathNode sink
where CommandInjectionFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Potential command injection from $@.", source.getNode(), "source"
findings.hypothesis: Command injection via subprocess or os.system

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Unsafe deserialization
 * @description Deserializing untrusted data using pickle or other unsafe methods can lead to arbitrary code execution
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id py/unsafe-deserialization
 * @tags security
 *        external/cwe/cwe-502
 */

import python
import semmle.python.ApiGraphs

from DataFlow::CallCfgNode call
where
  (
    call = API::moduleImport("pickle").getMember(["load", "loads", "Unpickler"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("cPickle").getMember(["load", "loads", "Unpickler"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("_pickle").getMember(["load", "loads", "Unpickler"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("yaml").getMember(["load", "unsafe_load"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("marshal").getMember(["load", "loads"]).getACall() or
    call = API::moduleImport("shelve").getMember("open").getACall()
  )
select call, "Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code."
findings.hypothesis: Unsafe deserialization using pickle, yaml, or marshal can lead to arbitrary code execution.

message.text: Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
Potentially unsafe deserialization operation that could execute arbitrary code.
